x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: TPRM knowledge base articles provide the domain content that Now Assist uses to generate accurate responses to vendor risk questions and assessment guidance. Without sufficient knowledge content, AI search results and self-service recommendations will be incomplete.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create KB articles covering vendor risk policies, assessment procedures, and compliance requirements.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_5ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c37
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[TPRM knowledge base articles provide the domain content that Now Assist uses to generate accurate responses to vendor risk questions and assessment guidance. Without sufficient knowledge content, AI search results and self-service recommendations will be incomplete.]]></ai_justification><check_name>TPRM Knowledge Base Articles</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(){
var ga=new GlideAggregate("kb_knowledge");
ga.addQuery("workflow_state","published");
ga.addQuery("short_description","CONTAINS","vendor");
ga.addAggregate("COUNT");ga.query();
var c=ga.next()?parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")):0;
if(c>=10)return{status:"ready",actualValue:c+" articles",finding:c+" vendor KB articles found."};
if(c>0)return{status:"needs_attention",actualValue:c+" articles",finding:c+" vendor KB articles found."};
return{status:"value_blocker",actualValue:"0 articles",finding:"No vendor KB articles found."};
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>TPRM</module><number>CHK0000584</number><order/><remediation_guidance>Create KB articles covering vendor risk policies, assessment procedures, and compliance requirements.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:21</sys_created_on><sys_id>5ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c37</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>TPRM Knowledge Base Articles</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_5ff89dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c37</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:01</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
